name: Melt UI
description: Headless, accessible component builders for Svelte with WAI-ARIA compliance

description.value: Headless, accessible component builders for Svelte with WAI-ARIA compliance

active-maintenance.comment: Very active - v0.86.6 released March 28, 2025; 197 releases; 3,171 commits; 108 contributors; Svelte 5 (Runes) version in active development

framework.comment: Built specifically for Svelte; SvelteKit support out-of-the-box; Svelte 5 Runes version available at next.melt-ui.com

styling-approach.comment: Ships unstyled - zero predefined styles; works with vanilla CSS, CSS preprocessors, Tailwind, or CSS-in-JS

component-model.comment: Headless builder pattern - provides behavior and accessibility only; builders return attributes to spread onto elements

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript (62.5% of codebase); fully typed API with autocompletion

ssr-compatible.comment: Built with SSR in mind; perfect fit for SvelteKit

rsc-compatible.comment: Not applicable - Svelte library, not React

design-system.comment: No design system - headless library for building your own design system

dark-mode.comment: Unstyled - dark mode implementation left to consumer

theming-system.comment: Unstyled - theming implementation left to consumer

css-variables.comment: No built-in CSS variables - completely unstyled

design-tokens.comment: No built-in design tokens - headless approach

rtl-support.comment: RTL support through proper ARIA implementation and text direction handling

component-count.comment: 39 builders: Accordion, Avatar, Calendar, Checkbox, Collapsible, Combobox, Context Menu, Date Field, Date Picker, Date Range Field, Date Range Picker, Dialog, Dropdown Menu, Hidden Input, Label, Link Preview, Listbox, Menu, Menubar, Pagination, Pin Input, Popover, Progress, Radio Group, Range Calendar, Scroll Area, Select, Separator, Slider, Switch, Table of Contents, Tabs, Tags Input, Toast, Toggle, Toggle Group, Toolbar, Tooltip, Tree

text-input.comment: No text input builder - use native HTML input elements

textarea.comment: No textarea builder - use native HTML textarea

select.comment: Select builder for single selection dropdown

multi-select.comment: Listbox builder supports multiple selection mode

combobox.comment: Combobox builder for searchable/filterable select with autocomplete

checkbox.comment: Checkbox builder for accessible checkbox implementation

radio.comment: Radio Group builder for accessible radio buttons

switch-toggle.comment: Switch builder for toggle switches; also Toggle and Toggle Group builders

tag-input.comment: Tags Input builder for multiple tags with add/remove

pin-input.comment: Pin Input builder for OTP/PIN code input

date-picker.comment: Date Picker builder; also Date Field for text input with date parsing

date-range-picker.comment: Date Range Picker and Date Range Field builders for selecting date ranges; also Range Calendar builder

input-groups.comment: No input groups builder - compose manually

input-with-dropdown.comment: No dedicated input with dropdown builder; compose with Combobox or Popover

button-groups.comment: Toggle Group builder for grouped button behavior; Toolbar builder for button groups

split-button.comment: No split button builder; compose with Menu builder

table.comment: No table builder - use native HTML tables

tree-view.comment: Tree builder with hierarchical list, keyboard navigation, multi-selection, smart focus management, and typeahead

list-view.comment: Listbox builder for accessible list selection

card.comment: No card builder - purely visual component, use HTML/CSS

badge.comment: No badge builder - purely visual component

tag-chip-pill.comment: No tag/chip builder - purely visual; Tags Input handles input behavior

calendar.comment: Calendar builder for month/week view; Range Calendar for date range display

alert.comment: No alert builder - purely visual component

toast-notification.comment: Toast builder for temporary popup notifications

progress-bar.comment: Progress builder for accessible progress indicators

progress-circle.comment: Progress builder is linear only; circular styling possible but not built-in

spinner-loader.comment: No spinner builder - purely visual component

skeleton.comment: No skeleton builder - purely visual component

empty-state.comment: No empty state builder - purely visual component

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog builder for accessible modal dialogs with focus trapping

drawer-sheet.comment: No dedicated drawer builder; compose with Dialog builder

popover.comment: Popover builder for floating content anchored to trigger

tooltip.comment: Tooltip builder for accessible hover hints

dropdown-menu.comment: Dropdown Menu builder for action menus; also general Menu builder

context-menu.comment: Context Menu builder for right-click menus

command-palette.comment: No dedicated command palette builder; compose with Combobox and Dialog

tabs.comment: Tabs builder for tab-based content switching

breadcrumb.comment: No breadcrumb builder - simple navigation, use HTML/CSS

pagination.comment: Pagination builder for page navigation controls

navigation-menu.comment: Menubar builder for accessible navigation menus

sidebar.comment: No sidebar builder - layout component, use HTML/CSS

grid.comment: No grid builder - layout component, use CSS

stack.comment: No stack builder - layout component, use CSS

container.comment: No container builder - layout component, use CSS

aspect-ratio.comment: No aspect ratio builder - use CSS

collapsible.comment: Collapsible builder for expandable/collapsible sections; also Accordion builder

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integration

form-libraries.comment: No official form library bindings; includes Hidden Input builder for form integration

animation-libraries.comment: Works with Svelte's built-in transitions and any animation library; no specific integration

icon-libraries.comment: No bundled icons - headless approach allows any icon library

date-libraries.comment: Date Picker and Calendar use native Date API; @internationalized/date mentioned in advanced usage

aria-compliant.comment: Core focus - strict adherence to WAI-ARIA guidelines; each component page documents relevant ARIA patterns

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard navigation handled automatically; follows WAI-ARIA keyboard interaction patterns

screen-reader-tested.comment: Accessibility is core focus; proper aria attributes, role management, and screen reader support

focus-management.comment: Proper focus handling built into all builders; focus trapping in overlays

wcag-level.comment: No explicit WCAG compliance level documented; follows WAI-ARIA design patterns

accessibility-rating.comment: Excellent - accessibility-first design; follows WAI-ARIA patterns strictly; handles all a11y details including aria attributes, role management, focus handling, and keyboard navigation

bundle-size-full.comment: Full bundle not typically used due to tree-shaking; import only needed builders

bundle-size-core.comment: Described as lightweight - import only what you need; Svelte's compiler tree-shakes effectively

tree-shakeable.comment: Builders can be imported individually; only adds what you use

zero-runtime.comment: JavaScript runtime required for builder behavior and accessibility features

lazy-loading.comment: Individual builders can be imported and loaded on demand

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with API reference, examples, and accessibility guidelines for each builder; interactive examples; dedicated a11y sections

interactive-docs.comment: Documentation includes interactive component examples with code

figma-kit.comment: No Figma kit - headless library without predefined designs

cli-generator.comment: CLI available via npx @melt-ui/cli@latest init for project setup

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: 97,883 weekly downloads as of December 2025; classified as popular

commercial-support.comment: Open source MIT licensed; community support via Discord; no paid enterprise tier

style-override.comment: Completely unstyled - apply any styles via class, style prop, or CSS variables; data attributes for state-based styling

compound-components.comment: Builder pattern returns multiple element builders (e.g., menu.trigger, menu.item) for composing compound components

render-props.comment: Uses builder pattern rather than render props; Svelte uses slots

slots.comment: Svelte native slots; builder pattern allows full control over component structure

unstyled-mode.comment: Completely unstyled by default - ships with zero predefined styles; that's the entire point of the library
